microsoft_ft: **Owned end-to-end onboarding** of enterprise clients onto Azure's resilience platform — scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual recovery drills and driving **$14M+ in business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 implementation** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining integration requirements and self-service configuration workflows that cut operational toil by 30% and enabled a fully scalable, repeatable client deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a validated framework for continuous production deployment.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating resolution across engineering, infrastructure, and external stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring integration workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase implementation capacity by 21%, enabling the team to manage more concurrent onboarding engagements without added headcount.

Developed and maintained onboarding documentation and integration best practices across all enterprise counterparty deployments, ensuring consistent production-readiness standards and accelerating time-to-go-live for new client environments.
microsoft_2023: Drove **client onboarding adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and structured enablement sessions that activated 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** across the Azure platform organization.

Shaped the product integration roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical API and tooling gaps that directly influenced the prioritization of intent-based YAML generation as a core platform capability.

Improved platform data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous **metadata standards** and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool — cutting stakeholder lookup time by 83% and reducing friction in the client-facing knowledge base.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating integration dependencies across 140+ internal service teams.

Conducted structured discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual operational toil** per region launch, then built and socialized a phased implementation roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and reduce client-impacting delays.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to surface operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact integration work, and track implementation milestones against delivery timelines.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy end-to-end — mapping connectivity dependencies across 1,200+ stations and sequencing integration milestones to ensure a seamless production deployment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority integration tickets** to stabilize the developer intake pipeline and maintain implementation velocity across concurrent workstreams.

Coordinated technical alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration framework for future platform rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by managing the end-to-end client onboarding and scoping lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals — implementing a structured CRM workflow that standardized counterparty data capture and reduced proposal turnaround time.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing client-facing web presence and Google profile to improve institutional lead quality and onboarding funnel throughput.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a structured data framework that informed integration of cost benchmarks into the client scoping process.
